bugs_found: Bug1: manager.py approve_plan broadcasts plan_cancelled before DB update in cancel path
Bug2: store/index.ts plan_started handler silently skips when plan not in store
Bug3: store/index.ts updatePlanStep raw step-id never matches DB-prefixed step-id
Bug4: db.py create_plan step_type normalisation double-lookup ambiguity
Bug5: repo_manager.py _execute_plan uses stale steps list for post-execution summary
Bug6: session_watcher.py debounce keeps-first instead of keeps-last in burst
bugs_fixed: Bug1: manager.py approve_plan - DB before broadcast; removed 503 on approve with no orchestrator
Bug4: db.py create_plan - simplified step_type normalisation to clear single-pass lookup
Bug5: repo_manager.py - re-fetch steps from DB after execution loop
Bug2: store/index.ts - plan_started creates stub plan when not in store
Bug3: store/index.ts - updatePlanStep migrates raw ids to DB-prefixed ids on first step_started
